name: VAR: Exterminate
short_description: The fight is here, humanity’s fate is in your hands! Match up different offensive and defensive upgrades between waves and fend off the onslaught of zombies. Level up and strengthen core abilities and progress to new areas where strains of the virus have evolved.
detailed_description:
FOLLOW US ON DISCORD



FOLLOW US ON TWITTER


↑↑↑↑↑↑ Click Me ↑↑↑↑↑↑


About the Game


VAR: Exterminate; Zombie rough-lite shooter that promises raw exhilarating horror with vast replayability. Designed exclusively for VR, immerse yourself in a post-apocalyptic city overrun by zombies

Dictate your outcome

Pick one of the 3 abilities offered to you at the beginning of every wave! Form your own ability tree and take on waves of relentless zombie attacks.

Immersive zombie survival

Eliminate zombies crawling all over the city, loot the undead to get money and chips to upgrade your weapons and equipment.

Rich and high-quality game content

There are 12 stages built for 2 Chapters. More will be added over time for free, so check back for more maps, stages, and chapters later.

Pick your style

Whether you’re a gunslinging cowboy or a grenade launching trooper. Exterminate offers an array of weapons for you to take the undead out in style.

Global Ranking

Have what it takes to be a top dog? Challenge yourself against players over the world and fight out if you really have what it takes to be the toughest mercenary in the field!

Only in VR

VAR: Exterminate is a zombie shooter built exclusively for VR. Step into the midst of a zombie apocalypse and join the fight to take back what is rightfully ours!

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Spanish - Spain, Russian, French, German
